name: Small Narrow Fridge and Pantry Organizer Bin - Brightroom™: Clear Kitchen Storage, Freezer-Safe, 10.5" Depth
description:
Elevate your fridge space while keeping food items neatly stored with this Small Fridge & Pantry Bin from Brightroom™. This small-size storage container brings instant organization to your fridge or pantry, and is a great essential for food storage. It features an open top design and clear construction to provide easy access and viewing to stored contents. Made from BPA-free material, it stands up to everyday use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
